stemHtml: Delays are expected at the arrival aerodrome at which a jet transport aeroplane plans to land. By managing the en-route airspeed, the pilot can increase the flight endurance by flying at…

options.a: minimum drag speed (V<sub>MD</sub>) at an intermediate flap configuration, due to the lower V<sub>MD</sub> speed value.
options.b: long Range Cruise speed (LRC), at clean configuration, which corresponds to the minimum required total thrust.
options.c: long Range Cruise speed (LRC), at an intermediate flap configuration, due to the lower LRC speed value.
options.d: minimum drag speed (V<sub>MD</sub>) at clean configuration, which corresponds to the minimum required total thrust.
